name: ContentHash
summary: Contains information that is useful to uniquely identify an object. RemarksThis object is immutable.

constructors.name: ContentHash
constructors.summary: Constructs a copy of a content hash.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other content hash to copy.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a copy of this content hash. Because content hash is immutable, this can be used as a deep copy.

returns.doc: A different instance of the same content hash.

methods.name: CreateFromFile
methods.summary: Creates a new ContentHash, representing the content of a file.

params.name: path
params.doc: A path. This can be null and can refer to a non-existing path.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Determines if another object is a content hash with same value.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The other content hash to compare.

returns.doc: True if the two hashes are equal.

methods.name: Equals(ContentHash)
methods.summary: Determines if another content hash has the same value.

params.name: other
params.doc: The other content hash to compare.

returns.doc: True if the two hashes are equal.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Gets an hash code for this content hash. Two equal content hashes have equal hash code. The other way around might not be true.

methods.name: Equality
methods.signature: public static bool operator ==(ContentHash left, ContentHash right)
methods.summary: Determines if two ContentHash instances are equal by value.

returns.doc: True if they are equal by value, otherwise false.

methods.name: Inequality
methods.signature: public static bool operator !=(ContentHash left, ContentHash right)
methods.summary: Determines if two ContentHash instances are different by value.

returns.doc: True if they are different by value, otherwise false.

properties.name: ByteCount
properties.summary: Gets the length of the content, in bytes.

properties.name: HashTime
properties.summary: Gets the hash time, rounded to seconds.

properties.name: Sha1ContentHash
properties.summary: Gets the 20-bytes long SHA1 hash of the content.

properties.name: Sha1NameHash
properties.summary: Gets the 20-bytes long SHA1 hash of the name.
